capability_title: Secure login and role-based feature gating
story: As an Owner/Admin, I want secure sign-in with API key and role context so that each user sees only permitted modules.
acceptance_criteria: User must authenticate before protected endpoints are available. || Access must be restricted by role values owner, admin, parent, teacher, driver. || Unauthorized access attempts must return explicit denial and be logged with timestamp and actor. || Session/token expiration behavior must be consistent across Website, ERP, Mobile.

capability_title: Secure login and role-based feature gating
story: As an Owner/Admin, I want role assignment management so that one user can hold one or more approved responsibilities.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can map user_id to role_id and manage status active/inactive. || Duplicate active role assignments for same user and role are blocked. || Any role assignment update is auditable with created_at and updated_at. || Inactive role assignment immediately removes menu visibility and action permissions.

capability_title: Secure login and role-based feature gating
story: As an end user, I want profile and role-aware home views so that I can access only relevant tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Parent home shows children, invoices, attendance summary, notices. || Teacher home shows classes, attendance actions, assessments, assignment grading queue. || Driver home shows route, stop sequence, assignment status, alerts. || Role change in ERP reflects in Website and Mobile on next session refresh.

story: As admissions staff, I want to register a new applicant with mandatory identity and guardian details so that applications are complete on first entry.
acceptance_criteria: Applicant capture enforces mandatory fields from student and parent entities. || admission_status defaults to not_started and admission record is generated. || Duplicate application number is prevented. || Validation errors must specify offending field and reason.

story: As a Student Counsellor, I want to review and update admission status with remarks so that eligibility decisions are traceable.
acceptance_criteria: Counsellor can move review_status through not_started, in_review, accepted, rejected. || reviewed_by_user_id and reviewed_at are auto-captured on decision. || Rejection requires remarks. || Accepted application triggers enrollment-ready state event.

story: As admissions staff, I want one-click conversion of accepted applicants to active students so that onboarding is consistent and fast.
acceptance_criteria: Conversion creates student record linked to parent and user. || class_id assignment is mandatory before activation. || Student status becomes active and admission_date is stored. || System generates audit record linking admission_id to student_id.

story: As admissions staff, I want to map student to parent/guardian relation type so that communication and billing follow the right contact.
acceptance_criteria: relation_type must be father, mother, or guardian. || At least one active guardian relation is required for active student. || Parent contact and address are reusable across siblings. || Inactive parent relation blocks billing dispatch to that contact.

story: As an admin, I want class and section configuration with teacher ownership so that academic planning is structured.
acceptance_criteria: class_level, section, room_no, class_teacher_id are mandatory. || Duplicate class_level + section in same academic cycle is blocked. || Class status controls whether attendance and assessments can be created. || Class updates retain historical assignment trail.

story: As an admin, I want subject catalog management by subject groups so that timetable and evaluation use normalized definitions.
acceptance_criteria: Subject requires name, subject_group, and book_name. || subject_group only allows science, arts, language, social. || Subject can be marked inactive but not deleted if referenced by period or exam schedule. || Subject edits are versioned for change history.

story: As an admin and teacher, I want period schedules with teacher and subject mapping so that class delivery is conflict-free.
acceptance_criteria: Period requires class_id, subject_id, teacher_id, start_time, end_time. || Teacher cannot be allocated to overlapping periods. || Mobile teacher view displays period list for the day. || Schedule modifications trigger teacher notification for impacted periods.

story: As a teacher, I want to open attendance session by class, date, and period so that daily attendance is captured accurately.
acceptance_criteria: Session creation requires class_id, attendance_date, period_no, teacher_id. || Session cannot be duplicated for same class/date/period. || Active session supports real-time marking for all enrolled students. || Session closure locks records except authorized correction workflow.

story: As a teacher, I want bulk attendance marking with present/absent/late/excused so that marking is fast in class.
acceptance_criteria: attendance_state accepts only defined enum values. || in_time and out_time remain optional but validated when present. || Late marking can capture remarks. || Each mark stores marked_by_user_id and timestamp.

story: As an admin, I want staff attendance tracking including leave and half-day so that payroll inputs remain reliable.
acceptance_criteria: Staff attendance supports present, absent, leave, half_day. || One staff attendance per staff_id per date is enforced. || Corrections require reason and privileged role. || Attendance export is available for payroll run consumption.

story: As a parent, I want same-day attendance visibility with exception alerts so that I can respond quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Parent sees attendance_state per child per session/day. || Absent/late events trigger mobile notification. || Excused events must display remarks. || Parent cannot modify attendance records.

story: As a teacher, I want to create assessments and map them to class and subject so that evaluation is structured.
acceptance_criteria: Assessment requires class_id, subject_id, teacher_id, type, title, max_marks, date. || Status transitions scheduled -> completed -> cancelled are enforced. || max_marks must be positive. || Assessment changes notify enrolled students' guardians.

story: As an admin, I want exam definitions and schedules per subject so that institutional exams run consistently.
acceptance_criteria: exam_id includes title, type, academic_year, start_date, end_date. || exam_schedule stores subject/date/time/max/pass marks. || Overlapping room allocation can be detected and flagged. || Schedule publish triggers role-targeted notifications.

story: As a teacher and parent, I want marks entry and result visibility with grading scale so that performance is transparent.
acceptance_criteria: Marks entry validates against max_marks and absence flag. || Percentage is auto-calculated where applicable. || grading_scale_id can be assigned from active grading scales. || Parent receives result publication alert and can view breakdown.

story: As a teacher, I want assignment publishing with due dates and optional marks so that out-of-class work is tracked.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment supports draft, published, closed states. || Published assignment appears in student/parent mobile task list. || due_date cannot be earlier than assigned_date. || Closing assignment prevents new submissions.

story: As a parent, I want to submit assignment text or attachment and monitor grading status so that academic follow-up is easier.
acceptance_criteria: Submission supports text and optional attachment URL. || Submission state supports submitted, graded, late, missing. || Grading feedback and score are visible after teacher update. || Late submission is auto-tagged when submitted after due_date.

story: As finance staff, I want class-level fee structure setup with frequencies and effective dates so that billing is rule-based.
acceptance_criteria: Fee structure requires class_id, fee_type, frequency, amount, effective_from. || frequency supports one_time, monthly, quarterly, annual. || Multiple active fee structures of same type and overlapping dates are blocked. || late_fee_per_day is optional and defaulted to zero.

story: As finance staff, I want student fee assignment with discount rules so that personalized billing is controlled.
acceptance_criteria: Student assignment links student_id and fee_structure_id. || discount_type supports none, percentage, fixed. || discount value validation enforces legal ranges. || Inactive assignment excludes the fee item from new invoices.

story: As finance staff, I want invoice generation with line-item totals and status transitions so that dues are tracked precisely.
acceptance_criteria: Invoice has unique invoice_no, subtotal, discount_total, late_fee_total, grand_total, paid_total, balance_total. || Status transitions support draft, issued, partially_paid, paid, overdue, cancelled. || Item-level totals roll up correctly to invoice totals. || Cancelling an invoice requires reason and blocks further payment capture.

story: As finance staff and parent, I want multi-mode payment recording and real-time balance update so that collections are reliable.
acceptance_criteria: Payment supports cash, upi, card, bank_transfer, cheque. || payment_ref_no must be unique. || On success: paid_total and balance_total update atomically. || Parent mobile app receives payment receipt notification.

story: As a parent, I want to view fee ledger and overdue alerts so that I do not miss deadlines.
acceptance_criteria: Parent can view invoices by status and due_date. || Overdue invoices trigger reminder notifications. || Invoice detail page displays line items and payment history. || Parent cannot edit financial entries.

story: As finance staff, I want salary component and staff salary structure setup so that payroll can be generated systematically.
acceptance_criteria: Components support earning/deduction and fixed/percentage mode. || Salary structure links staff_id, component_id, value_type, value_amount, effective dates. || Inactive components are excluded from new runs. || All changes are timestamped and audit tracked.

story: As finance staff, I want payroll run processing and approval workflow so that salary posting is controlled.
acceptance_criteria: payroll_run supports draft, processed, approved, posted. || Approval captures approved_by_user_id and approved_at. || Payslip generation stores gross, deduction, net values per staff. || Failed payments keep payslip in pending or failed state.

story: As finance staff, I want journal entries generated from fee and payroll transactions so that books stay reconcilable.
acceptance_criteria: Journal creation supports reference_type manual, fee_payment, payroll, expense, adjustment. || Journal posting requires balanced debit and credit entries. || Posted journals are immutable except via controlled reversal. || Journal status transitions are auditable.

story: As an owner, I want chart of account hierarchy and manual-entry controls so that governance is maintained.
acceptance_criteria: account_code uniqueness is enforced. || Parent-child account relations prevent cycles. || allow_manual_entry controls whether users can post directly. || Inactive accounts cannot receive new entries.

story: As an admin, I want vehicle, route, and stop master setup so that transport assignments are predictable.
acceptance_criteria: Vehicle requires vehicle_no and registration_no uniqueness. || Route requires route_name uniqueness and shift selection. || Stop requires sequence_no for each route. || Inactive routes/stops are excluded from new assignments.

story: As operations, driver, and parent users, I want route assignment visibility so that pickup/drop operations are coordinated.
acceptance_criteria: Driver-vehicle-route assignment includes academic year and effective dates. || Student assignment must reference route_id, stop_id, vehicle_id, driver_user_id. || Driver mobile app displays daily stop list and assigned students. || Parent receives route and timing updates through notifications.

story: As a driver, I want shift-based trip checklist and incident notes so that route completion is reportable.
acceptance_criteria: Driver can mark stop reached and pickup/drop completion state. || Incident note entry is available per stop. || Trip progress is visible to ERP operations dashboard. || End-of-shift completion timestamp is stored.

story: As an admin, I want announcement creation with target role and scheduling so that communication reaches intended users.
acceptance_criteria: Notification supports title, body, type, target_role, schedule. || is_broadcast supports all-user broadcast and targeted delivery. || Cancelled notifications do not deliver to recipients. || Delivery attempts and failures are logged.

story: As a recipient, I want read/unread tracking so that I can manage important updates.
acceptance_criteria: Each recipient record stores is_read and read_at. || Unread count is shown on mobile home. || Mark-all-read action updates recipient states correctly. || Read state syncs across devices for same user.

story: As the system, I want automatic notifications on key events so that users get timely updates without manual intervention.
acceptance_criteria: Events include admission decision, fee due, payment success/failure, attendance absent/late, exam schedule publish, result publish, transport assignment. || Notification payload contains actor, target, summary, and action link. || Duplicate notifications for same idempotency key are prevented. || Failed dispatch is retried based on configured policy.

epic_title: Data Governance, Audit, And Lifecycle Control
story: As an admin, I want soft-delete behavior using deleted_at and status transitions so that historical records remain available.
acceptance_criteria: Delete action sets deleted_at instead of hard removal for operational entities. || Inactive and deleted records are excluded from default list views. || Recovery workflow can reactivate eligible records. || Referential integrity is checked before void/archive operations.

epic_title: Data Governance, Audit, And Lifecycle Control
capability_title: Full audit trail and operational logging
story: As governance users, I want immutable audit trails for critical actions so that compliance and dispute resolution are possible.
acceptance_criteria: Critical actions include admissions decision, marks edits, invoice cancellation, payment reversal, payroll posting, journal posting. || Audit includes who, when, before/after values, and source channel. || Audit logs are searchable by entity and date range. || Unauthorized attempts are captured separately.

story: As the platform, I want event-driven state synchronization so that user-facing data remains consistent across channels.
acceptance_criteria: State change events are emitted for admissions, attendance, invoices, payments, exams, and transport updates. || Mobile and Website consume canonical payload format. || Failed consumers retry safely without duplicate side effects. || Event processing latency KPI is measurable.

story: As an admin, I want integration health and failed-job visibility so that operational issues are resolved quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Failed sync jobs appear in monitoring queue. || Admin can retry failed jobs with trace id. || Retry operation is idempotent. || Incident logs can be exported for support.

story: As leadership and operations users, I want role-specific dashboards and exports so that decisions are data-driven.
acceptance_criteria: Counsellor dashboard includes application funnel and conversion rates. || Academic dashboard includes attendance trend and exam performance. || Finance dashboard includes collections, overdue, and posting status. || Exports support filtered datasets with audit-safe metadata.

story: As mobile users, I want concise status widgets and alerts so that I can act quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Parent widget: dues, attendance exceptions, upcoming exams. || Teacher widget: pending attendance, grading backlog, schedule changes. || Driver widget: trip status, next stop, incident flags. || Widgets refresh with low-latency synced data.

story: Define role-permission matrix for every module action (create, read, update, void/archive, approve).
acceptance_criteria: Matrix version-controlled and approved. || API authorization enforces matrix. || UI action visibility aligns with API authorization.

story: Implement canonical timestamp and timezone policy for all date/time fields.
acceptance_criteria: Storage timezone normalized. || Channel display conversion rules documented. || No ambiguity for attendance and payment timestamps.

story: Implement payment idempotency and reversal controls.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate payment reference handling is deterministic. || Reversal updates invoice and accounting records consistently. || Parent receives reversal notification.

story: Build automated reconciliation checks between invoices, payments, and journal entries.
acceptance_criteria: Mismatch detector reports orphan or imbalanced records. || Daily reconciliation summary is generated. || Critical mismatches trigger escalation alerts.
